title: Monday.com calendar view not working via shareable link, issue logged from 04/03/2025
excerpt: We are experiencing an issue with the calendar view via the shareable link. I raised a ticket, and the agent mentioned that the Monday team is looking into it. For a faster resolution, we need to provide permissions. How…

posts.author: vineetha_karira (Vineetha Karira)
posts.cookedHtml: We are experiencing an issue with the calendar view via the shareable link. I raised a ticket, and the agent mentioned that the Monday team is looking into it. For a faster resolution, we need to provide permissions. However, it has been 10 days since we logged the issue, and it still seems to be broken. Unfortunately, I cannot provide the necessary permissions because I do not have admin access. Is there any other way to resolve this?

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @vineetha_karira I just tried a calendar view with a shared link in a private browser and it views fine. What is the issue you are seeing?

posts.author: vineetha_karira (Vineetha Karira)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Wally, this is something that is happening on one particular board for me.

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: What’s the actual issue though? Does it not load, not show items in the calendar etc, did you want to share some screen shots of the calendar from your view and from the shared view perhaps?

posts.author: vineetha_karira (Vineetha Karira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Wally, this problem is now resolved, it was apparently an issue with the permissions i.e., only edit content in which we need to manually change the view settings.
Thank you.
